en: These are the stages of the people of Israel, when they went out of the land of Egypt by their companies under the leadership of Moses and Aaron.
zh: 以下是以色列人按著他們的隊伍，在摩西和亞倫的手下，從埃及地出來以後所行的路程。

en: Moses wrote down their starting places, stage by stage, by command of the LORD, and these are their stages according to their starting places.
zh: 摩西照著耶和華的命令，把他們出發的路程記下來，他們出發的路程是這樣：

en: They set out from Rameses in the first month, on the fifteenth day of the first month. On the day after the Passover, the people of Israel went out triumphantly in the sight of all the Egyptians,
zh: 一月十五日，就是逾越節的次日，以色列人從蘭塞起行，在所有埃及人眼前昂然無懼地出去了。

en: while the Egyptians were burying all their firstborn, whom the LORD had struck down among them. On their gods also the LORD executed judgments.
zh: 那時，埃及人正在埋葬他們的長子，就是耶和華在他們中間擊殺的，耶和華也對他們的神施行審判。

en: So the people of Israel set out from Rameses and camped at Succoth.
zh: 以色列人從蘭塞起行，在疏割安營。

en: And they set out from Succoth and camped at Etham, which is on the edge of the wilderness.
zh: 從疏割起行，在曠野邊界的以倘安營。

en: And they set out from Etham and turned back to Pihahiroth, which is east of Baal-zephon, and they camped before Migdol.
zh: 從以倘起行，轉到比哈．希錄，是在巴力．洗分前面，就在密奪對面安營。

en: And they set out from before Hahiroth and passed through the midst of the sea into the wilderness, and they went a three days' journey in the wilderness of Etham and camped at Marah.
zh: 從比哈．希錄起行，經過了海來到曠野，又在伊坦曠野走了三天的路程，就在瑪拉安營。

en: And they set out from Marah and came to Elim; at Elim there were twelve springs of water and seventy palm trees, and they camped there.
zh: 從瑪拉起行，來到以琳；在以琳有十二股水泉，七十棵棕樹；他們就在那裡安營。

en: And they set out from Elim and camped by the Red Sea.
zh: 從以琳起行，在紅海邊安營。

en: And they set out from the Red Sea and camped in the wilderness of Sin.
zh: 從紅海起行，在汛的曠野安營。

en: And they set out from the wilderness of Sin and camped at Dophkah.
zh: 從汛的曠野起行，在脫加安營。

en: And they set out from Dophkah and camped at Alush.
zh: 從脫加起行，在亞錄安營。

en: And they set out from Alush and camped at Rephidim, where there was no water for the people to drink.
zh: 從亞錄起行，在利非訂安營，在那裡眾民沒有水喝。

en: And they set out from Rephidim and camped in the wilderness of Sinai.
zh: 從利非訂起行，在西奈的曠野安營。

en: And they set out from the wilderness of Sinai and camped at Kibroth-hattaavah.
zh: 從西奈的曠野起行，在基博羅．哈他瓦安營。

en: And they set out from Kibroth-hattaavah and camped at Hazeroth.
zh: 從基博羅．哈他瓦起行，在哈洗錄安營。

en: And they set out from Hazeroth and camped at Rithmah.
zh: 從哈洗錄起行，在利提瑪安營。

en: And they set out from Rithmah and camped at Rimmon-perez.
zh: 從利提瑪起行，在臨門．帕烈安營。

en: And they set out from Rimmon-perez and camped at Libnah.
zh: 從臨門．帕烈起行，在立拿安營。

en: And they set out from Libnah and camped at Rissah.
zh: 從立拿起行，在勒撒安營。

en: And they set out from Rissah and camped at Kehelathah.
zh: 從勒撒起行，在基希拉他安營。

en: And they set out from Kehelathah and camped at Mount Shepher.
zh: 從基希拉他起行，在沙斐山安營。

en: And they set out from Mount Shepher and camped at Haradah.
zh: 從沙斐山起行，在哈拉大安營。

en: And they set out from Haradah and camped at Makheloth.
zh: 從哈拉大起行，在瑪吉希錄安營。

en: And they set out from Makheloth and camped at Tahath.
zh: 從瑪吉希錄起行，在他哈安營。

en: And they set out from Tahath and camped at Terah.
zh: 從他哈起行，在他拉安營。

en: And they set out from Terah and camped at Mithkah.
zh: 從他拉起行，在密加安營。

en: And they set out from Mithkah and camped at Hashmonah.
zh: 從密加起行，在哈摩拿安營。

en: And they set out from Hashmonah and camped at Moseroth.
zh: 從哈摩拿起行，在摩西錄安營。

en: And they set out from Moseroth and camped at Bene-jaakan.
zh: 從摩西錄起行，在比尼．亞干安營。

en: And they set out from Bene-jaakan and camped at Hor-haggidgad.
zh: 從比尼．亞干起行，在曷．哈及甲安營。

en: And they set out from Hor-haggidgad and camped at Jotbathah.
zh: 從曷．哈及甲起行，在約巴他安營。

en: And they set out from Jotbathah and camped at Abronah.
zh: 從約巴他起行，在阿博拿安營。

en: And they set out from Abronah and camped at Ezion-geber.
zh: 從阿博拿起行，在以旬．迦別安營。

en: And they set out from Ezion-geber and camped in the wilderness of Zin (that is, Kadesh).
zh: 從以旬．迦別起行，在尋的曠野安營，尋就是加低斯。

en: And they set out from Kadesh and camped at Mount Hor, on the edge of the land of Edom.
zh: 從加低斯起行，在以東地邊界上的何珥山安營。

en: And Aaron the priest went up Mount Hor at the command of the LORD and died there, in the fortieth year after the people of Israel had come out of the land of Egypt, on the first day of the fifth month.
zh: 以色列人從埃及地出來以後四十年，五月一日，亞倫祭司照著耶和華的吩咐，上了何珥山，就死在那裡。

en: And Aaron was 123 years old when he died on Mount Hor.
zh: 亞倫死在何珥山上的時候，是一百二十三歲。

en: And the Canaanite, the king of Arad, who lived in the Negeb in the land of Canaan, heard of the coming of the people of Israel.
zh: 那時，住在迦南地南方的迦南人亞拉得王，聽說以色列人來了。

en: And they set out from Mount Hor and camped at Zalmonah.
zh: 以色列人從何珥山起行，在撒摩拿安營。

en: And they set out from Zalmonah and camped at Punon.
zh: 從撒摩拿起行，在普嫩安營。

en: And they set out from Punon and camped at Oboth.
zh: 從普嫩起行，在阿伯安營。

en: And they set out from Oboth and camped at Iye-abarim, in the territory of Moab.
zh: 從阿伯起行，在摩押邊境的以耶．亞巴琳安營。

en: And they set out from Iyim and camped at Dibon-gad.
zh: 從以耶．亞巴琳起行，在底本．迦得安營。

en: And they set out from Dibon-gad and camped at Almon-diblathaim.
zh: 從底本．迦得起行，在亞門．低比拉太音安營。

en: And they set out from Almon-diblathaim and camped in the mountains of Abarim, before Nebo.
zh: 從亞門．低比拉太音起行，在尼波前面的亞巴琳山安營。

en: And they set out from the mountains of Abarim and camped in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho;
zh: 從亞巴琳山起行，在耶利哥對面，約旦河邊的摩押平原安營。

en: they camped by the Jordan from Bethjeshimoth as far as Abel-shittim in the plains of Moab.
zh: 他們在摩押平原，沿著約旦河邊安營，從帕．耶施末直到亞伯．什亭。

en: And the LORD spoke to Moses in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho, saying,
zh: 耶和華在摩押平原約旦河邊，耶利哥對面對摩西說：

en: "Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, When you pass over the Jordan into the land of Canaan,
zh: “你要吩咐以色列說：‘你們過約旦河到了迦南地的時候，

en: then you shall drive out all the inhabitants of the land from before you and destroy all their figured stones and destroy all their metal images and demolish all their high places.
zh: 就要把所有的居民從你們面前趕出去，毀壞他們的一切雕像，以及一切鑄像，又拆毀他們的一切邱壇。

en: And you shall take possession of the land and settle in it, for I have given the land to you to possess it.
zh: 你們要佔領那地，住在那裡，因為我已經把那地賜給你們作產業。

en: You shall inherit the land by lot according to your clans. To a large tribe you shall give a large inheritance, and to a small tribe you shall give a small inheritance. Wherever the lot falls for anyone, that shall be his. According to the tribes of your fathers you shall inherit.
zh: 你們要按著家族抽籤承受那地作產業；人多的，要把產業多分給他們；人少的，要把產業少分給他們；抽籤抽出那地歸誰，就歸誰；你們要按著宗族支派承受產業。

en: But if you do not drive out the inhabitants of the land from before you, then those of them whom you let remain shall be as barbs in your eyes and thorns in your sides, and they shall trouble you in the land where you dwell.
zh: 如果你們不把那地的居民從你們面前趕出去，所留下的人就必成為你們眼中的刺，肋旁的荊棘，在你們所住的地方擾害你們；

en: And I will do to you as I thought to do to them."
zh: 並且我原計劃怎樣待他們，也要怎樣待你們。’”
